MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jason Flom; of Donahue Fitzgerald, Tel. 510.451.3000, for defendants and moving party;
Edward Woch, in propria persona, Tel. 619.807.6601, appeared telephonically via CourtCall after hearing concluded.

RULING: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT ECOLOGY AND ENVIRONMENT, INC., RON KARPOWICZ, DAVE PLUMPTON Motion To Compel Deposition Of Pltf Edward Woch And For Sanctions is granted. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000. ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHALL BE MADE TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THE ORDER. Order signed.
